roms.name: LineageOS 23.2 Unofficial II
roms.changelog: April Security Patch. Switched to Pixel Thermal Service. Added Screen Off UDFPS support. Fixed Fast Charging & Disconnecting issue. Blobs updated from latest OnePlus Nord 2 stock ROM (vendor security patch: July 2025). Signed build. Misc improvements. By ManshuTyagi.

roms.name: Lunaris AOSP 3.8
roms.changelog: Initial release. Added Sony Dolby Atmos (OnePlus UI). Added Warp Charging Overlay. Disabled 6GHz hotspot (broken). Gapps | Userdebug build. SELinux: Enforcing. Signed with release keys. Known bug: Screen Off UDFPS. By Rakhshan.

roms.name: EvolutionX v11.6.1
roms.changelog: Rebranded to op6893. Improved udfps behaviour. Temporarily rolled back some. previous changes(bt, wifi). Synced with latest rom changes. February security patches

roms.name: LineageOS 23.2 Unofficial
roms.changelog: Rebranded to op6893. Switched back to mtk vibrator hal. Fixed video call issues across all major apps. Fixed open and close animations. Misc improvements. By ManshuTyagi.

roms.name: Axion AOSP V2.2.1
roms.changelog: Axion AOSP V2.2.1 Nightly. Unofficial GMS build for Cupida (RMX3031) and Denniz. Android 16. Screen off UDFPS now works.

roms.name: RisingOS Revived 8.1.1
roms.changelog: RisingOS Revived 8.1.1 unofficial build for RMX3031. Android 16.

roms.name: Axion AOSP 2.5
roms.changelog: Added Oplus Camera. Non-rooted build. Shipped with Revanced Apps. Clean flash mandatory. By zatvio.

kernels.name: ReSukiSU Cupida Denniz (COS16/OOS16)
kernels.changelog: SuSFS v2.1.0. Tagged for ColorOS 16 and OxygenOS 16 ROMs.

kernels.name: COS 16 Kernel KSU Next
kernels.changelog: COS 16 kernel . KernelSU Next . LSPosed working . SuSFS v1.5.5. SELinux: Enforcing. Flash SUSFS-FOR-KERNELSU module (required for better stealth/root hiding). Added UDFPS support.

kernels.name: COS 16 Kernel (No Root)
kernels.changelog: COS 16 kernel without root. Charging fix for RMX3031. Added UDFPS support

kernels.name: KSU Next Cupida Denniz
kernels.changelog: KernelSU Next. LSPosed working. SuSFS v1.5.5. SELinux: Enforcing. Flash SUSFS-FOR-KERNELSU module (required for better stealth/root hiding). Added UDFPS support.

kernels.name: Kernel RMX3031 Charging Fix (No Root)
kernels.changelog: Charging fix kernel for RMX3031. Added UDFPS support

kernels.name: SukiSU Ultra RMX3031 (Unstable)
kernels.changelog: Working: Root via SukiSU Ultra, SuSFS v2.0.0, Zygisk Next, Tricky Store / Play Integrity, Droidspaces / Linux container, KPM modules. Not working: ReZygisk (version check blocks non-submodule KSU), LSPosed (incompatible with Android 16 QPR2 ART).

kernels.name: COS 16 Kernel (No Root)(Unstable)
kernels.changelog: COS 16 kernel without root for RMX3031

kernels.name: Stock KSU Kernel
kernels.changelog: Stock kernel with KernelSU for RMX3031

kernels.name: Kernel v4.19.325 KSUN SuSFS v1.5.5
kernels.changelog: Linux 4.19.325 with KernelSU Next and SuSFS v1.5.5 and Nethunter

modules.name: SUSFS for KernelSU
modules.changelog: Required for better stealth and root hiding with KernelSU Next. Flash via KSU Manager.

modules.name: Permissiver V5
modules.changelog: Permissiver V5 for RMX3031. Flashable via Magisk or TWRP.

ota.name: X7-MAX A15 Toolbox
ota.changelog: Three-in-one package includes TWRP, Fastboot and SP Flash Tool. Sequential upgrade path: A22 > C12 > F13 > F24 (no data wipe needed). Cross-version upgrades/downgrades require data format.
